reasoning: While ESPN and the NFL have reportedly revived "advanced talks" as of March 2025 for ESPN to acquire NFL Media for approximately $2 billion, no formal agreement has been signed by late April. Even if the parties reach a definitive agreement around May or June 2025, closing the transaction by December 31, 2025, presents a tight timeline. Complex media acquisitions—especially involving highly scrutinized entities like Disney/ESPN and the NFL—often face antitrust review or operational integration hurdles that can push closing dates back (similar to the regulatory hurdles faced by Venu Sports). Furthermore, these negotiations previously stalled in mid-2024 before resuming in February 2025, showing that an agreement is not guaranteed. Given a ~70% chance they reach a deal and a ~70% chance it closes before year-end, the overall probability is around 49%, closely aligning with the recent market estimate of 0.52.
